[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001010000 3
1 0111000101 5
2 1101111110 8
3 0111111100 7
4 1100111110 7
5 1001111101 7
6 1110100101 6
7 1010101111 7

01 10 0011100110 5

70 07 1000101000 3
